Spectral reliability

Per-image visual prototypes
top-k evidence patches
v_a, v_n and c_a, c_n

span.p:
Conservative text prototype calibration
t_n,t_a + v_n,v_a -> t_n~, t_a~

span.p:
Patch score branch
patch features + t_n~,t_a~
layer fusion -> pixel anomaly map A(x)
